Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Moonlight Bridge]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Moonlight Bridge cannot be used to bring anyone else along for the ride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Moonlight Bridge takes up to three days to recover if used to move all the way around the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Moonlight Bridge can be used as much as desired when traveling within sight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Moonlight Bridge is located in Yerin's spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — Ruby used the Moonlight Bridge to run off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The Moonlight Bridge can be restored by Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The Moonlight Bridge can be used by Yerin to return in a flash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The Moonlight Bridge can make Yerin's spirit glow bright.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The Moonlight Bridge can be used to disappear and reappear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Yerin used the Moonlight Bridge to dodge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin decided not to use the Moonlight Bridge to move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin used the Moonlight Bridge to appear at Sophara's throat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Moonlight Bridge is a construct Yerin can use to join the fight.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Moonlight Bridge is a technique used by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin can activate the Moonlight Bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Moonlight Bridge began to activate.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin may have taken the Moonlight Bridge back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — The Moonlight Bridge can make it difficult to find Yerin Arelius once she flees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin's Moonlight Bridge wraps her in white light to transport her.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's Moonlight Bridge has a restoration period.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Moonlight Bridge can be used while a spatial lock is disrupted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Moonlight Bridge is a technique that can be tracked in principle but is difficult to do so.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin's Moonlight Bridge works even inside the Sage of Red Faith's scripts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Moonlight Bridge is a method of transport into the cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin readied her Moonlight Bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Moonlight Bridge is a technique Yerin considered using.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — The Moonlight Bridge is used for transportation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon does not have the Moonlight Bridge available for transport.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin's Moonlight Bridge was created with the help of Reigan Shen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Moonlight Bridge is a Divine Treasure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Daughter of the Destroyer can grant access to the Moonlight Bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin has a Moonlight Bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin's Moonlight Bridge sputtered white light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Moonlight Bridge is an artifact belonging to Yerin.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
